allow: PowerShell(Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location 'c:\\Users\\zaidh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\ShotBoard'; npm run dev } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { "HTTP " + \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Get-Job | Stop-Job; Get-Job | Remove-Job)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -NoNewWindow -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev-out.log -RedirectStandardError dev-err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content dev-out.log -Tail 15; "----ERR----"; Get-Content dev-err.log -Tail 15; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force 2>$null; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null)
